channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Killer doctor's son played key role in his demise as he recalls haunting sounds decades later
item.description: Dr. John Boyle murdered his wife, Noreen Boyle, on Dec. 31, 1989. Authorities found the Ohio woman's body on Jan. 25, 1990, under the basement floor of John's new home in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Millionaire boomers less likely to share their wealth: Charles Schwab
item.description: Data revealed that baby boomers, born from 1946 to 1964, plan to spend most of their wealth rather than reserve it for future generations.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, KRON4

item.title: Trump gets warm welcome as he watches Army-Navy game alongside key allies, nominees and Daniel Penny
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump huddled with allies and a Republican cause célèbre at Saturday's Army-Navy football game, taking in one of the most storied rivalries in college sports while spotlighting his emerging national security team.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, TARA COPP and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: San Francisco cafe employee takes down would-be thief
item.description: The video (above) shows a man wearing a black hoodie and mask walking into the cafe and trying to take an item from a customer dining inside.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Jamie Foxx reportedly injured in altercation at Beverly Hills restaurant
item.description: Foxx, who turned 57 on Friday, was dining with family at Mr. Chow when patrons at a nearby table hurled rude and vulgar insults to the "In Living Color" and "Ray" star, a witness told TMZ.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Storms encase Iowa and eastern Nebraska in ice and generate rare tornado warning in San Francisco
item.description: A major ice storm created treacherous driving conditions across Iowa and eastern Nebraska this weekend and prompted temporary closures of Interstate 80 after numerous cars and trucks slid off the road.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, Fox 5

item.title: A look back at the most notable bankruptcies of 2024
item.description: This year saw its fair share of bankruptcies, with household names and century-old companies in the mix.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pelosi 'on the mend' after hip replacement surgery in Germany
item.description: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), who was hospitalized during a trip to Luxembourg, underwent hip surgery early Saturday, according to a spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Obesity rate among US adults fell in 2023 for first time in over a decade: Study
item.description: The obesity rate among U.S. adults fell in 2023 for the first time in over a decade, according to a new study released on Friday. The study published in the journal JAMA Health Forum found that obesity nationwide has dropped from 46 percent in 2022 to 45.6 percent last year.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Proposal to list border-crossing monarch butterflies as 'threatened' draws opposition
item.description: Monarch butterflies could be elevated to "threatened" species as proposed this week by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, but some officials in Texas say that would interfere with ranches and businesses and hurt the economy.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, WGN 9

item.title: Texas father set house on fire with 3 children inside: police
item.description: A Texas father is facing charges over allegations that he intentionally set his home on fire with his three children inside, according to police.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese phone hack victims haven't been notified: Report
item.description: AT&T and Verizon have reportedly not informed some hacking victims that they were specifically targeted.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her — making national headlines that stirred tensions about race, class and the privilege of college athletes — has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says GOP will push to eliminate daylight saving time
item.description: President-elect Trump on Friday said Republicans would push to eliminate daylight saving time, calling it "inconvenient" and "costly.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court will hear Catholic charitable group's plea to be free from Wisconsin unemployment tax
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday said it would take up a new religious rights case over whether a Catholic charitable organization must pay Wisconsin's employment tax.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO shooter manhunt aided by San Francisco police tip
item.description: Days before Luigi Mangione was found after an officer in the Special Victims Unit of the San Francisco PD recognized Mangione in photos.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ingle, NewsNation

item.title: Woman who accused Duke lacrosse players of rape admits she lied
item.description: A woman who accused three former Duke University men’s lacrosse players of rape nearly two decades ago admitted she lied about the allegations and asked them for forgiveness.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KTLA 5

item.title: 2 cats die from suspected bird flu traced to raw milk in California
item.description: Health officials are investigating possible cases of H5 bird flu after two cats died from consuming recalled raw milk, according to the Los Angeles County Department of Public Health.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, WGN 9

item.title: Nearly half of US teens are online 'constantly': Pew report
item.description: Nearly half of American teenagers say they are online “constantly” despite concerns about the effects of social media and smartphones on their mental health, according to a new report published Thursday by the Pew Research Center.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former inmate where Luigi Mangione is: Big cases 'upset' order
item.description: During the phone interview, current inmates shouted through the fence at the State Correctional Institution Huntingdon in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Texas sues DuPont, 3M over 'forever chemicals' in consumer products
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton (R) is suing companies that have historically made toxic “forever chemicals,” commonly referred to as PFAS, or products that contain them, alleging false advertising over their safety.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, ABC 4

item.title: Here's how Airbnb is trying to block New Year's Eve parties
item.description: Airbnb is stepping up efforts to prevent unauthorized and disruptive parties this New Year’s Eve - or at least trying to. The short-term property rental company is rolling out new anti-party technology around the globe, aiming to block high-risk bookings.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Traces of fentanyl were found inside bottlenose dolphins that were found dead in the Gulf of Mexico, raising concerns that the deadly drug may be affecting other sea life.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5

item.title: Albertsons sues Kroger for failing to win approval of their proposed supermarket merger
item.description: Kroger and Albertsons' plan for the largest U.S. supermarket merger in history crumbled Wednesday, with Albertsons pulling out of the $24.6 billion deal and the two companies accusing each other of not doing enough to push their proposed alliance through.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Amazing Kreskin, renowned mentalist and frequent late-night guest, dies at 89
item.description: The Amazing Kreskin, an entertainer and mentalist who rose to fame amid frequent appearances on TV talk shows like “The Tonight Show” and “The Mike Douglas Show,” has died, his family confirmed on social media. He was 89 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WFLA, NBC
